tasks.title: Mobile parity required matrix

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck
